beginner_prompts.description: Sea-air, watery, salty, and cool.

beginner_prompts.description: Leafy, damp, forest-like, and grounded.

concepts.label: Fresh / clean
concepts.starterQuery: I want something fresh and easy to wear
concepts.plainLanguage: Airy, soapy, rain-like, and easy to wear.
concepts.beginnerHint: If you want a safe starting point, this is the easiest vibe to understand and wear.

concepts.label: Aromatic / herbal
concepts.starterQuery: I want something aromatic and herbal
concepts.plainLanguage: Herbal, lavender-like, and clean rather than sweet.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the herbal side of vanilla: fresher, calmer, and less dessert-like.

concepts.label: Aquatic / salty
concepts.starterQuery: I want something aquatic and salty
concepts.plainLanguage: Sea-air, watery, salty, and cool.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is a good starting point if you want something beachy, airy, or marine rather than sweet.

concepts.label: Sweet / cozy
concepts.starterQuery: I want something sweet and cozy
concepts.plainLanguage: Warm, creamy, dessert-like, and comforting.
concepts.beginnerHint: A lot of people start here when they want something immediately pleasant and familiar.

concepts.label: Amber / resinous
concepts.starterQuery: I want something amber and vanilla
concepts.plainLanguage: Golden, resinous, warm, and softly sweet.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the amber side of vanilla: richer, warmer, and more resinous.

concepts.label: Smoky / dark
concepts.starterQuery: I want something smoky but wearable
concepts.plainLanguage: Atmospheric, resinous, smoky, and sometimes dramatic.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the easiest family for people who want depth and mood instead of brightness.

concepts.label: Animalic / sensual
concepts.starterQuery: I want something animalic and sensual
concepts.plainLanguage: Feral, skin-like, and intimate.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the animalic side of vanilla: darker, dirtier, and more intimate.

concepts.label: Woody / polished
concepts.starterQuery: I want something woody and polished
concepts.plainLanguage: Dry, structured, calm, and often a little expensive-feeling.
concepts.beginnerHint: If you want something less sweet and more grounded, start here.

concepts.label: Floral / iris
concepts.starterQuery: I want something soft and pretty
concepts.plainLanguage: Soft, cosmetic, elegant, and sometimes powdery.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is a good starting point if you want perfume to feel pretty, soft, or classic.

concepts.label: Powdery / iris
concepts.starterQuery: I want something powdery and soft
concepts.plainLanguage: Cosmetic, soft, powdery, and often elegant.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is useful if you want something plush, makeup-like, or softly floral.

concepts.label: Citrus / bright
concepts.starterQuery: I want something bright and citrusy
concepts.plainLanguage: Sparkling, zesty, sunny, and easy to understand.
concepts.beginnerHint: If you want perfume that feels uplifting and obvious in a good way, start here.

concepts.label: Fruity / juicy
concepts.starterQuery: I want something fruity and juicy
concepts.plainLanguage: Lush, ripe, juicy, and candy-like without being dry.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the fruity side of vanilla: ripe, playful, and sometimes dessert-like.

concepts.label: Spicy / warm
concepts.starterQuery: I want something spicy and warm
concepts.plainLanguage: Peppery, warming, and lightly fiery.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the spicy side of vanilla: warmer, sharper, and more textured.

concepts.label: Leather / suede
concepts.starterQuery: I want something leather and suede
concepts.plainLanguage: Supple, smoky, dry, and second-skin-like.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is useful if you want vanilla with a darker, more tailored edge.

concepts.label: Oud / woody
concepts.starterQuery: I want something oud and woody
concepts.plainLanguage: Dark, resinous, woody, and often luxurious.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the oud side of vanilla: dense, smoky, and richly textured.

concepts.label: Tobacco / warm
concepts.starterQuery: I want something tobacco and warm
concepts.plainLanguage: Sweet, smoky, honeyed, and dry in the leaf sense.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the tobacco side of vanilla: warm, slightly smoky, and rich.

concepts.label: Green / earthy
concepts.starterQuery: I want something green and natural
concepts.plainLanguage: Leafy, damp, forest-like, and grounded.
concepts.beginnerHint: Choose this if you want something more natural and less sweet.

concepts.label: Green / airy
concepts.starterQuery: I want something green and airy
concepts.plainLanguage: Botanical, translucent, and fresh rather than earthy.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is the green side of vanilla: brighter, airier, and less mossy.

concepts.label: Musky / skin-like
concepts.starterQuery: I want something soft and skin-like
concepts.plainLanguage: Soft, intimate, and close to the skin.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is useful if you want something subtle rather than loud or sweet.

concepts.label: Lactonic / creamy
concepts.starterQuery: I want something creamy and lactonic
concepts.plainLanguage: Milky, cushioned, soft, and often dessert-like.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is useful when you want a smooth vanilla that feels plush rather than dry.

concepts.label: Metallic / polished
concepts.starterQuery: I want something metallic and polished
concepts.plainLanguage: Cool, crisp, shiny, and futuristic.
concepts.beginnerHint: This is useful if you want something sharp, polished, or a little futuristic.

concepts.label: Aldehydic / crisp
concepts.starterQuery: I want something aldehydic and crisp
concepts.plainLanguage: Sparkling, airy, and often very polished.
concepts.beginnerHint: Choose this if you want a sharp, sparkling, or classic clean effect.

concepts.label: Cool weather
concepts.starterQuery: I want something rich for winter
concepts.plainLanguage: Usually richer, darker, and better with depth.
concepts.beginnerHint: Cool weather perfumes usually lean warmer, deeper, and more textured.

concepts.label: Warm weather
concepts.starterQuery: I want something light for warm weather
concepts.plainLanguage: Usually lighter, brighter, and more airy.
concepts.beginnerHint: Warm weather perfumes usually stay fresher and less dense.
